description: A citizen wants to find the name of the owner of a specific property.

nodes.task_description: Gather the property address from the citizen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the address of the property in question.

nodes.task_description: Search the public property records database.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully searches the database using the address.

nodes.task_description: Provide the name of the current owner as listed in the public record.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the owner's name to the citizen.
